notes: 1323 keep models pinned to the BioModels version whose sha256 matches our tested bytes (1274 at latest, 49 resolved to an older version, 0 unresolved drift). Re-fetch deterministically via model/download/<id>.<version>. Also covers rr_parity's biomodels_dir SBML.
